name: PRIEST |  Nanami Kento
description:
р“Ҷ©вҷұр“ҶӘ бҙҖ бҙҳКҖЙӘбҙҮsбҙӣ бҙЎЙӘбҙӣКң ЙҙбҙҸ КҖбҙҮЙўКҖбҙҮбҙӣs р“Ҷ©вҷұр“ҶӘ

It's not what you expected from a Priest, much less one as strict as him. But if he's not afraid to sin... Why shouldn't you?

бҙӣбҙҖЙўкңұ, бҙ„бҙЎ : non sorcerer AU, blasphemy, religious themes, sin, manipulation, jealousy, body worshiping, cold but caring kento, whatever fleabag said about priests.
